row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a straight urban road with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Static buildings and parked cars; moving vehicles follow standard road paths.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane roads, modern glass buildings, sidewalks, and traffic infrastructure.
semantic.visibility_notes: Clear visibility of all key elements; no significant occlusions or distortions.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion; objects transition naturally without abrupt jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain consistent trajectories; pedestrians and cyclists move realistically within their lanes.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building structures remain stable and continuous throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected; traffic flow appears orderly and predictable.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and texture fidelity.
semantic.visibility_notes: Many objects appear blurred, duplicated, or partially missing; reduced detail compared to reference.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Minor flickering in object boundaries; some vehicles show slight positional jitter or warping over time.
logical.object_continuity: Certain objects vanish or reappear inconsistently; trajectory smoothness is compromised in places.
logical.structure_continuity: Building edges and road surfaces exhibit minor warping or ghosting artifacts during motion.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though path stability may be slightly affected by visual noise.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability could impair downstream decision-making; no overt collision risk visible.
